evals.prompt: I have a CSV with 5 raw contacts from a trade show. Can you run the ClimatePoint Contact Intelligence pipeline to enrich and classify them so I know who to reach out to first?
evals.expected_output: A classified CSV file with Title, Company, Persona, Lead Score, Need State, Opportunity Type, Outreach Angle, and Next Action for all 5 contacts. High-scoring leads should have specific outreach angles.

assertions.name: output_csv_exists
assertions.description: A classified output CSV was produced

assertions.name: all_personas_populated
assertions.description: All 5 contacts have a non-empty Persona field

assertions.name: scores_numeric_1_to_10
assertions.description: Lead Score values are integers between 1 and 10 (or 0 for internal)

assertions.name: outreach_angles_present
assertions.description: Contacts with score >= 5 have a non-empty Outreach Angle

assertions.name: next_actions_present
assertions.description: All contacts have a non-empty Next Action field

evals.prompt: Classify these contacts and flag any low-fit or internal contacts. I want to make sure we don't waste outreach on students, HR people, or ClimatePoint employees.
evals.expected_output: CSV with Low-fit / Other personas for students/HR/internal contacts. ClimatePoint domains should score 0. Word boundaries used so 'International' doesn't match 'intern'.

assertions.name: amanda_not_lowfit
assertions.description: Amanda Dyke (Bocconi / International Business) is NOT classified as Low-fit / Other

assertions.name: daniele_not_investor
assertions.description: Daniele Ragni (Associate Professor at TU Delft) is NOT classified as Investor / Fund Persona

assertions.name: daniele_classified_analyst
assertions.description: Daniele Ragni (Associate Professor at TU Delft) is classified as Technical / Analyst (not Unknown, not Investor), matching SKILL.md's documented Associate-Professor rubric

assertions.name: internal_scores_zero
assertions.description: Test Intern at climatepoint.com has Lead Score = 0 and Persona = Low-fit / Other

assertions.name: word_boundaries_used
assertions.description: The classifier script or process mentions using word boundaries for LOW_FIT keywords

evals.prompt: I need account research on the top-scored leads from my classified file. Can you run Phase 3 for leads with score 7 and above?
evals.expected_output: Enhanced CSV with company-level fields: Industry, Company Size, Has Physical Product, Has Manufacturing, Regulatory Exposure, Likely LCA Need, Estimated Urgency, Recommended Offer.

assertions.name: account_fields_present
assertions.description: Top-scored leads have Industry, Company Size, Has Physical Product, Has Manufacturing, Regulatory Exposure fields

assertions.name: lca_need_populated
assertions.description: Likely LCA Need field is populated for high-scored leads

assertions.name: recommended_offer_present
assertions.description: Recommended Offer field is populated for high-scored leads
